description: Configure social impact assessment data in openLCA using the USLCI database (imported from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). Create a social indicator named 'Child Labor Risk' within a 'Human Rights' category. Assign this indicator to the 'Transport, combination truck, diesel powered' process with a value of 1.5 and the comment 'Sector Audit 2025'. Export the modified process as a JSON-LD package to ~/LCA_Results/transport_social_risk.zip.
